title: First Conditional
description: Real future possibilities with if + present, will + base verb
summary_pt_br: Primeiro condicional — if + presente, will + verbo base, para possibilidades reais.

exercises.question: If it ___ tomorrow, we will stay home.
exercises.explanation: In the 'if' clause we use present simple, even for future meaning.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Na oração com 'if', usamos presente simples.

exercises.question: If you study hard, you ___ (pass) the exam.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Na oração principal: will + verbo base.

pairs: If I have time, I'll help.
Se eu tiver tempo, eu ajudarei.
If it's sunny, we'll go out.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Primeiro condicional — situações reais no futuro.
